decision: Used a WritableComputedRef bridge (categoryBridge) to map FeedbackCategory | undefined ↔ FeedbackCategory | '' at the DOM-select boundary, keeping draft.category strictly FeedbackCategory | undefined.
alternative_not_taken: Coerce draft.category to a '' sentinel (as LLMConfigCell does for provider) — rejected because the validation rule tests category !== undefined; '' would pass that check and let an unchosen category through.
rationale: Decision B in the phase plan explicitly requires this pattern. The '' sentinel defeats the !== undefined guard.
